cases.prompt: Create a flow for vendor onboarding
cases.reason: Creating a BaseUcanFlow template is authoring work.

cases.prompt: Add an email step after approved claim
cases.reason: Adding an action and configuring a trigger belongs to template authoring.

cases.prompt: The approved-claim email listener is overdue
cases.reason: Overdue live runtime state belongs to Ralph Loop orchestration.

cases.prompt: This claim node is blocked because a condition is unmet
cases.reason: Blocked live node diagnosis belongs to FlowAgentService runtime operation.

cases.prompt: Apply the accepted proposal to add a missing input field
cases.reason: Applying an approved config proposal changes the BaseUcanFlow template.

cases.prompt: Propose how to fix stale config causing a runtime block
cases.reason: Runtime stale-config diagnosis emits propose_config_change without directly editing the template.

negativeChecks.mustNot: diagnose leases, outbox, ledger, or UDID runtime state
